title: Fraction Calculator - Add, Subtract, Multiply, Divide Fractions
description: Free fraction calculator. Add, subtract, multiply, and divide fractions. Simplify fractions and convert between mixed numbers and improper fractions.
keywords: fraction calculator, add fractions, subtract fractions, multiply fractions, divide fractions, simplify fractions
intro: Perform arithmetic operations on fractions: addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. Results are automatically simplified.

faq.a: To add fractions, find a common denominator, add the numerators, then simplify. Example: 1/3 + 1/4 = 4/12 + 3/12 = 7/12.

faq.q: How do you simplify a fraction?
faq.a: Divide both the numerator and denominator by their greatest common divisor (GCD). Example: 8/12 → divide both by 4 → 2/3.
